name: codex-coordinator
description: Launch and coordinate multiple Codex agents for one large repository goal, including explicit delegation without Ultra.

interface.shortDescription: Launch coordinated agents for large coding goals
interface.longDescription: Turn one large repository goal into bounded work for multiple Codex agents, including explicit delegation without Ultra. Keep ownership, routing, shared-checkout boundaries, pauses, and restart recovery traceable.
defaultPrompt: Create the tasks needed and coordinate this goal: <goal>
Show who is working on what and what is blocked
Turn Codex Coordinator off for this repository
